sphinx~=7.2

# Theme
furo~=2024.1

# API reference generation
#   - Python: sphinx.ext.autosummary (bundled with Sphinx)
#   - C++:    Doxygen -> Breathe -> Exhale (auto-generated tree)
breathe~=4.35
exhale~=0.3

# Markdown & notebooks
myst-nb~=1.0

# Authoring helpers
sphinx-design~=0.5
sphinx-copybutton~=0.5
sphinx-math-dollar~=1.2

# Notebook figure rendering
kaleido~=0.2
